				<div class="elementor-widget-container">
					<p data-start="390" data-end="572">Hermes OMI Obsidian is a powerful setup because it gives your AI agents real context, daily memory, and a better way to understand what you do.</p>
<p data-start="574" data-end="740">Most AI agents still feel limited because they forget important details, lose context after each session, and need you to repeat the same information again and again.</p>
<p data-start="742" data-end="937">Inside the <a class="decorated-link" href="https://www.skool.com/ai-profit-lab-7462/about" target="_new" rel="noopener" data-start="753" data-end="822">AI Profit Boardroom</a>, you can learn practical AI workflows like this so your agents become useful systems instead of random chat tools.</p>
<p data-start="939" data-end="961">Watch the video below:</p>
<p><iframe title="Hermes AI Agent + Obsidian + Omi is Insane (FREE!)" width="790" height="444" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/RytNZ_5JLQo?start=19&feature=oembed" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen=""></iframe></p>
<p data-start="963" data-end="1089">Want to make money and save time with AI? Get AI Coaching, Support & Courses<br>
<img draggable="false" role="img" class="emoji" alt="👉" src="https://s.w.org/images/core/emoji/17.0.2/svg/1f449.svg"> <a class="decorated-link" href="https://www.skool.com/ai-profit-lab-7462/about" target="_new" rel="noopener" data-start="1043" data-end="1089">https://www.skool.com/ai-profit-lab-7462/about</a></p>
<h2 data-section-id="15siu32" data-start="1091" data-end="1141">Hermes OMI Obsidian Makes AI Memory More Useful</h2>
<p data-start="1143" data-end="1250">Hermes OMI Obsidian matters because memory is one of the biggest missing pieces in most AI agent workflows.</p>
<p data-start="1252" data-end="1416">A normal AI chat can answer questions, but it does not always understand your daily work, your habits, your tasks, your goals, or the context behind your decisions.</p>
<p data-start="1418" data-end="1487">That becomes a problem when you want an agent to help with real work.</p>
<p data-start="1489" data-end="1551">You do not want to explain everything again every single time.</p>
<p data-start="1553" data-end="1612">You want the agent to understand what has already happened.</p>
<p data-start="1614" data-end="1663">That is where Hermes OMI Obsidian becomes useful.</p>
<p data-start="1665" data-end="1703">OMI can capture context from your day.</p>
<p data-start="1705" data-end="1761">Obsidian can organize that context inside a local vault.</p>
<p data-start="1763" data-end="1804">Hermes can then use that vault as memory.</p>
<p data-start="1806" data-end="1907">That creates a much better system than manually feeding your AI agent notes every time you need help.</p>
<p data-start="1909" data-end="1945">The workflow becomes more automatic.</p>
<p data-start="1947" data-end="2046">You live your day, OMI captures useful context, Obsidian stores it, and Hermes uses it when needed.</p>
<p data-start="2048" data-end="2072">That is the simple idea.</p>
<p data-start="2074" data-end="2135">It turns memory from a manual chore into a background system.</p>
<h2 data-section-id="rmaymp" data-start="2137" data-end="2185">Hermes OMI Obsidian Gives Agents More Context</h2>
<p data-start="2187" data-end="2261">Hermes OMI Obsidian works because context is what makes AI agents smarter.</p>
<p data-start="2263" data-end="2302">Without context, an agent has to guess.</p>
<p data-start="2304" data-end="2351">It might not know what you worked on yesterday.</p>
<p data-start="2353" data-end="2390">It might not know your current goals.</p>
<p data-start="2392" data-end="2434">It might not know which tasks matter most.</p>
<p data-start="2436" data-end="2481">It might not know what you already discussed.</p>
<p data-start="2483" data-end="2508">That creates weak output.</p>
<p data-start="2510" data-end="2586">With more context, Hermes can answer in a way that fits your real situation.</p>
<p data-start="2588" data-end="2690">OMI helps by capturing details from your screen, microphone, conversations, tasks, and daily activity.</p>
<p data-start="2692" data-end="2754">Obsidian then becomes the place where those memories can live.</p>
<p data-start="2756" data-end="2853">This is useful because Obsidian is simple, local, flexible, and easy to connect with other tools.</p>
<p data-start="2855" data-end="2955">You can store memory files, notes, task ideas, project details, and useful context inside one vault.</p>
<p data-start="2957" data-end="3002">Hermes can use that vault as a memory source.</p>
<p data-start="3004" data-end="3090">That means Hermes does not need to rely only on whatever you type in the current chat.</p>
<p data-start="3092" data-end="3159">It can look at the background knowledge you have already collected.</p>
<p data-start="3161" data-end="3199">That changes the quality of the agent.</p>
<p data-start="3201" data-end="3232">It starts to feel less generic.</p>
<p data-start="3234" data-end="3277">It starts to feel more personal and useful.</p>
<h2 data-section-id="hrg6jm" data-start="3279" data-end="3319">OMI Captures The Context Hermes Needs</h2>
<p data-start="3321" data-end="3441">OMI is useful in the Hermes OMI Obsidian setup because it captures context that you would normally forget to write down.</p>
<p data-start="3443" data-end="3489">Most people do not take perfect notes all day.</p>
<p data-start="3491" data-end="3591">They have calls, conversations, tasks, ideas, browsing sessions, and decisions happening constantly.</p>
<p data-start="3593" data-end="3653">Then later they expect an AI agent to understand everything.</p>
<p data-start="3655" data-end="3715">That does not work unless the context is captured somewhere.</p>
<p data-start="3717" data-end="3787">OMI helps by recording and organizing what happens throughout the day.</p>
<p data-start="3789" data-end="3847">It can use microphone access to understand spoken context.</p>
<p data-start="3849" data-end="3915">It can use screen recording to understand what you are working on.</p>
<p data-start="3917" data-end="3973">It can create memories automatically from your activity.</p>
<p data-start="3975" data-end="4074">That is powerful because the memory system keeps growing without you manually writing every detail.</p>
<p data-start="4076" data-end="4159">In the transcript, the setup had hundreds of memories after only a couple of weeks.</p>
<p data-start="4161" data-end="4251">That shows how quickly useful context can build up when the system runs in the background.</p>
<p data-start="4253" data-end="4303">The real benefit is not just storing random notes.</p>
<p data-start="4305" data-end="4378">The benefit is giving your AI agents a better understanding of your work.</p>
<p data-start="4380" data-end="4526">When Hermes can access that kind of context, it can help with better answers, better automation ideas, better task planning, and better follow-up.</p>
<p data-start="4528" data-end="4568">That is why OMI is a strong first layer.</p>
<h2 data-section-id="j99opu" data-start="4570" data-end="4626">Obsidian Turns Hermes OMI Obsidian Into A Local Brain</h2>
<p data-start="4628" data-end="4697">Obsidian is the second part that makes Hermes OMI Obsidian practical.</p>
<p data-start="4699" data-end="4776">OMI captures the memories, but Obsidian gives those memories a place to live.</p>
<p data-start="4778" data-end="4831">That matters because a memory system needs structure.</p>
<p data-start="4833" data-end="4925">You do not want useful context trapped inside one app where your agent cannot easily use it.</p>
<p data-start="4927" data-end="4982">Obsidian works well because it stores notes in a vault.</p>
<p data-start="4984" data-end="5040">That vault can become a local knowledge base for Hermes.</p>
<p data-start="5042" data-end="5084">You can export OMI memories into Obsidian.</p>
<p data-start="5086" data-end="5174">You can also add your own notes, ideas, project files, task lists, and personal context.</p>
<p data-start="5176" data-end="5251">That creates one place where your AI agent can look for useful information.</p>
<p data-start="5253" data-end="5312">The best part is that this does not need to be complicated.</p>
<p data-start="5314" data-end="5394">You can point Hermes toward the Obsidian vault or the specific memory file path.</p>
<p data-start="5396" data-end="5444">Then Hermes can use that information as context.</p>
<p data-start="5446" data-end="5502">That makes the setup feel practical for local AI agents.</p>
<p data-start="5504" data-end="5600">Instead of manually training the agent again and again, you give it access to the memory source.</p>
<p data-start="5602" data-end="5623">That is much cleaner.</p>
<p data-start="5625" data-end="5692">Hermes OMI Obsidian becomes a simple second brain for AI workflows.</p>
<h2 data-section-id="xz7ok5" data-start="5694" data-end="5749">Hermes OMI Obsidian Works Across Different AI Agents</h2>
<p data-start="5751" data-end="5801">Hermes OMI Obsidian is not only useful for Hermes.</p>
<p data-start="5803" data-end="5846">That is one of the best parts of the setup.</p>
<p data-start="5848" data-end="5945">Once your memories are stored inside Obsidian, other local AI agents can use that same vault too.</p>
<p data-start="5947" data-end="6057">That means OpenClaw, Claude Code, Hermes, and other local workflows can all benefit from the same memory base.</p>
<p data-start="6059" data-end="6124">You do not need to build a separate memory system for every tool.</p>
<p data-start="6126" data-end="6190">You can create one source of context and reuse it across agents.</p>
<p data-start="6192" data-end="6208">That saves time.</p>
<p data-start="6210" data-end="6255">It also keeps your workflows more consistent.</p>
<p data-start="6257" data-end="6331">If every agent has a different memory source, the output can become messy.</p>
<p data-start="6333" data-end="6359">One agent knows one thing.</p>
<p data-start="6361" data-end="6396">Another agent misses it completely.</p>
<p data-start="6398" data-end="6459">A shared Obsidian vault gives your tools a better foundation.</p>
<p data-start="6461" data-end="6534">This is especially useful if you are building serious AI agent workflows.</p>
<p data-start="6536" data-end="6571">You might use one agent for coding.</p>
<p data-start="6573" data-end="6602">Another agent for automation.</p>
<p data-start="6604" data-end="6631">Another agent for research.</p>
<p data-start="6633" data-end="6660">Another agent for planning.</p>
<p data-start="6662" data-end="6765">With Hermes OMI Obsidian, they can all pull from the same background context if you set it up properly.</p>
<p data-start="6767" data-end="6973">Inside the <a class="decorated-link" href="https://www.skool.com/ai-profit-lab-7462/about" target="_new" rel="noopener" data-start="6778" data-end="6847">AI Profit Boardroom</a>, workflows like this are useful because they show how to connect tools into systems instead of using every AI app separately.</p>
<h2 data-section-id="1duhple" data-start="6975" data-end="7020">Hermes OMI Obsidian Makes Memory Automatic</h2>
<p data-start="7022" data-end="7085">Hermes OMI Obsidian is powerful because it reduces manual work.</p>
<p data-start="7087" data-end="7113">Manual memory is annoying.</p>
<p data-start="7115" data-end="7149">You need to remember what to save.</p>
<p data-start="7151" data-end="7177">You need to write it down.</p>
<p data-start="7179" data-end="7203">You need to organize it.</p>
<p data-start="7205" data-end="7246">You need to tell the agent where to look.</p>
<p data-start="7248" data-end="7295">Most people will not keep doing that every day.</p>
<p data-start="7297" data-end="7327">Automatic memory is different.</p>
<p data-start="7329" data-end="7397">OMI can capture your activity and create memories in the background.</p>
<p data-start="7399" data-end="7468">Obsidian can store those memories in a format that is easy to manage.</p>
<p data-start="7470" data-end="7511">Hermes can read from that stored context.</p>
<p data-start="7513" data-end="7547">That creates a much smoother loop.</p>
<p data-start="7549" data-end="7612">The more you use the system, the more useful context builds up.</p>
<p data-start="7614" data-end="7666">This is where AI agents start to feel more personal.</p>
<p data-start="7668" data-end="7809">They can understand your projects, your daily work, your recurring tasks, your goals, and even smaller details that would normally disappear.</p>
<p data-start="7811" data-end="7885">That does not mean you should blindly capture everything without thinking.</p>
<p data-start="7887" data-end="7963">You still need to care about privacy, permissions, and what you want stored.</p>
<p data-start="7965" data-end="8043">But when used carefully, automatic memory can make AI agents much more useful.</p>
<p data-start="8045" data-end="8079">The goal is not to create clutter.</p>
<p data-start="8081" data-end="8144">The goal is to create helpful context that your agents can use.</p>
<h2 data-section-id="hbxeta" data-start="8146" data-end="8191">The AI Success Lab — Build Smarter With AI</h2>
<p data-start="8193" data-end="8233"><img draggable="false" role="img" class="emoji" alt="👉" src="https://s.w.org/images/core/emoji/17.0.2/svg/1f449.svg"> <a class="decorated-link" href="https://aisuccesslabjuliangoldie.com/" target="_new" rel="noopener" data-start="8196" data-end="8233">https://aisuccesslabjuliangoldie.com/</a></p>
<p data-start="8235" data-end="8385">Inside, you’ll get step-by-step workflows, templates, and tutorials showing exactly how creators use AI to automate content, marketing, and workflows.</p>
<p data-start="8387" data-end="8485">It’s free to join — and it’s where people learn how to use AI to save time and make real progress.</p>
<h2 data-section-id="l1t5ca" data-start="8487" data-end="8544">Hermes OMI Obsidian Helps With Better Automation Ideas</h2>
<p data-start="8546" data-end="8642">Hermes OMI Obsidian becomes even more useful when you start asking what your agent can automate.</p>
<p data-start="8644" data-end="8687">Most people ask AI agents random questions.</p>
<p data-start="8689" data-end="8744">That is fine, but it is not the most powerful use case.</p>
<p data-start="8746" data-end="8883">A better approach is to ask the agent to look at your memory, your tasks, your goals, and your patterns, then suggest useful automations.</p>
<p data-start="8885" data-end="8954">Hermes can understand more when it has access to your Obsidian vault.</p>
<p data-start="8956" data-end="8982">It can see repeated tasks.</p>
<p data-start="8984" data-end="9007">It can notice patterns.</p>
<p data-start="9009" data-end="9052">It can help find workflows that waste time.</p>
<p data-start="9054" data-end="9104">It can suggest ways to automate parts of your day.</p>
<p data-start="9106" data-end="9155">That is where the setup becomes more than memory.</p>
<p data-start="9157" data-end="9196">It becomes a workflow discovery system.</p>
<p data-start="9198" data-end="9229">You are not just storing notes.</p>
<p data-start="9231" data-end="9301">You are giving your AI agent enough context to help improve your work.</p>
<p data-start="9303" data-end="9416">That can be useful for creators, developers, business owners, marketers, and anyone managing lots of daily tasks.</p>
<p data-start="9418" data-end="9501">The more useful context Hermes has, the better it can suggest practical next steps.</p>
<p data-start="9503" data-end="9573">That is the difference between a generic agent and a personalized one.</p>
<p data-start="9575" data-end="9608">Generic agents give broad advice.</p>
<p data-start="9610" data-end="9688">Hermes OMI Obsidian can help based on what is actually happening in your work.</p>
<h2 data-section-id="igyxzj" data-start="9690" data-end="9741">Hermes OMI Obsidian Still Needs Smart Boundaries</h2>
<p data-start="9743" data-end="9803">Hermes OMI Obsidian is powerful, but it needs careful setup.</p>
<p data-start="9805" data-end="9893">That matters because this kind of memory workflow can capture a lot of personal context.</p>
<p data-start="9895" data-end="9989">Screen recording and microphone access can be useful, but they should be handled thoughtfully.</p>
<p data-start="9991" data-end="10031">You need to know what is being recorded.</p>
<p data-start="10033" data-end="10080">You need to know where the memories are stored.</p>
<p data-start="10082" data-end="10128">You need to know which agents can access them.</p>
<p data-start="10130" data-end="10180">You need to be careful with sensitive information.</p>
<p data-start="10182" data-end="10225">That is not a reason to avoid the workflow.</p>
<p data-start="10227" data-end="10261">It is a reason to use it properly.</p>
<p data-start="10263" data-end="10275">Start small.</p>
<p data-start="10277" data-end="10324">Decide what context you actually want captured.</p>
<p data-start="10326" data-end="10352">Check what OMI is writing.</p>
<p data-start="10354" data-end="10385">Review what goes into Obsidian.</p>
<p data-start="10387" data-end="10451">Give Hermes access only to the folders or files that make sense.</p>
<p data-start="10453" data-end="10506">This keeps the system useful without making it messy.</p>
<p data-start="10508" data-end="10554">The goal is not to capture everything blindly.</p>
<p data-start="10556" data-end="10630">The goal is to build a memory layer that helps your AI agents work better.</p>
<p data-start="10632" data-end="10687">A good memory system should save time, not create risk.</p>
<p data-start="10689" data-end="10810">Hermes OMI Obsidian works best when you treat memory as part of your workflow, not as a random dump of everything you do.</p>
<p data-start="10812" data-end="10871">That keeps the setup clean, practical, and easier to trust.</p>
<h2 data-section-id="75duba" data-start="10873" data-end="10927">Hermes OMI Obsidian Is A Practical AI Agent Upgrade</h2>
<p data-start="10929" data-end="11011">Hermes OMI Obsidian is worth paying attention to because it solves a real problem.</p>
<p data-start="11013" data-end="11076">Most AI agents are only as good as the context they can access.</p>
<p data-start="11078" data-end="11114">Without memory, they feel forgetful.</p>
<p data-start="11116" data-end="11159">Without organization, memory becomes messy.</p>
<p data-start="11161" data-end="11240">Without a local place to store context, the workflow becomes harder to control.</p>
<p data-start="11242" data-end="11282">This setup combines three useful pieces.</p>
<p data-start="11284" data-end="11314">Hermes gives you the AI agent.</p>
<p data-start="11316" data-end="11343">OMI captures daily context.</p>
<p data-start="11345" data-end="11392">Obsidian stores the memory in a flexible vault.</p>
<p data-start="11394" data-end="11436">Together, they create a stronger workflow.</p>
<p data-start="11438" data-end="11496">You can use it to help Hermes understand your work better.</p>
<p data-start="11498" data-end="11552">You can use it to give other AI agents better context.</p>
<p data-start="11554" data-end="11644">You can use it to build a personal AI memory system without constantly repeating yourself.</p>
<p data-start="11646" data-end="11685">That is why this setup feels practical.</p>
<p data-start="11687" data-end="11732">It is not about adding another shiny AI tool.</p>
<p data-start="11734" data-end="11786">It is about making your existing agents more useful.</p>
<p data-start="11788" data-end="11850">If your AI agent knows more about your work, it can help more.</p>
<p data-start="11852" data-end="11930">If that memory updates automatically, the workflow becomes easier to maintain.</p>
<p data-start="11932" data-end="12003">Hermes OMI Obsidian is a simple idea, but it can make a big difference.</p>
<p data-start="12005" data-end="12208">For people who want practical examples, the <a class="decorated-link" href="https://www.skool.com/ai-profit-lab-7462/about" target="_new" rel="noopener" data-start="12049" data-end="12118">AI Profit Boardroom</a> is a place to learn AI workflows focused on real implementation instead of random theory.</p>
<h2 data-section-id="kcyyrs" data-start="12210" data-end="12265">Frequently Asked Questions About Hermes OMI Obsidian</h2>
<ol data-start="12267" data-end="13170" data-is-last-node="" data-is-only-node="">
<li data-section-id="1h9c9z5" data-start="12267" data-end="12443">What Is Hermes OMI Obsidian?<br>
Hermes OMI Obsidian is a workflow that connects OMI memory capture with an Obsidian vault so Hermes can use that stored context as agent memory.</li>
<li data-section-id="fpdioz" data-start="12444" data-end="12629">Why Is Hermes OMI Obsidian Useful?<br>
Hermes OMI Obsidian is useful because it gives AI agents better context, persistent memory, and a more automatic way to understand your daily work.</li>
<li data-section-id="15ls68" data-start="12630" data-end="12793">Can Hermes Use Obsidian As Memory?<br>
Yes, Hermes can use an Obsidian vault or specific memory files as context when you point it toward the right local file path.</li>
<li data-section-id="mdk7cb" data-start="12794" data-end="12995">Does OMI Automatically Create Memories?<br>
Yes, OMI can capture daily context through features like microphone access, screen context, and memory generation, then export that information into Obsidian.</li>
<li data-section-id="18lcare" data-start="12996" data-end="13170" data-is-last-node="">Can Other AI Agents Use The Same Obsidian Memory?<br>
Yes, other local AI agents can use the same Obsidian vault if they can access the file path and use the notes as context.</li>
</ol>
